name: Pesto Toscano (Tuscan Pesto)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the kale well in cold water and pat it dry.
2. Cut away the ribs and stem of the kale, leaving only the leafy greens.
3. Combine all the ingredients in a food processor and process to form a thick paste.
4. Transfer the pesto to an airtight container and store in the refrigerator for up to 5 or 6 days.
- Variation: For a milder and less robust flavor, blanch the kale in boiling water for 3 to 5 minutes before processing.
- Serves 12 as an appetizer on crostini.
